history.text: Urartu appears in Armenia's historical record.
The Kingdom of Armenia emerged, giving the area a defined monarchical state structure.
Bagratid Armenia appears in Armenia's historical record.
Armenian Kingdom of Cilicia ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Zakarid Armenia appears in Armenia's historical record.
First Republic of Armenia introduced a new form of state rule.
Armenian Soviet Socialist Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
Armenia became independent from the USSR, marking a key step in modern statehood.

worthSeeing.title: Ancient Monasteries:
worthSeeing.text: Geghard, Khor Virap and Noravank are among the oldest Christian monasteries.

worthSeeing.title: Mount Ararat Views:
worthSeeing.text: The iconic snow-capped peak dominates the horizon from Yerevan.

worthSeeing.title: Unique Alphabet:
worthSeeing.text: Armenian script, created in 405 AD, is still used in its original form.
